title: FICO Credit Score Spectrum
description: Interactive visualization showing the FICO credit score ranges from 300-850 with color-coded categories and descriptions of each score range.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Credit Score
FICO
Credit Rating
Personal Finance
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of fico credit score spectrum
Explore fico credit score spectrum through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of fico credit score spectrum to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on fico credit score spectrum
